requirement_topic.en: Authorized Mexican Importer (RFC), SAT Customs, and Spanish Labelling (NOM-004-SE)
requirement_topic.zh: 授权墨西哥进口商（RFC）、SAT海关及西班牙语标注（NOM-004-SE）
requirement_topic.zht: 授權墨西哥進口商（RFC）、SAT海關及西班牙語標注（NOM-004-SE）

summary.en: Wireless devices imported into Mexico must clear customs through an authorized Mexican legal entity that holds an RFC (Registro Federal de Contribuyentes) tax registration with SAT (Servicio de Administracion Tributaria). The SAT pedimento (customs declaration) and a commercial invoice identifying the importer are required for each shipment. Product labels must be in Spanish per NOM-004-SE (Informacion Comercial — Etiquetado) and must display: the IFT homologacion number, the Mexican importer name and address, country of origin, model and serial identification, and applicable NOM references. Chinese-language-only labels and CE or FCC markings do not satisfy NOM-004-SE. Under USMCA, a Certificate of Origin may reduce or eliminate Mexican import duties applicable to goods originating in China (note: Chinese-origin goods are generally not USMCA eligible and attract MFN tariff rates).
summary.zh: 进口至墨西哥的无线设备须通过持有SAT（国家税务局）RFC（联邦纳税人登记）税务登记的授权墨西哥法律实体清关。每批货物须提供SAT进口申报单（pedimento）及载明进口商信息的商业发票。产品标签须依据NOM-004-SE（商业信息——标签标注）以西班牙语标注，并须显示：IFT产品认证编号、墨西哥进口商名称和地址、原产国、型号和序列号标识，以及适用的NOM参考标准。纯中文标签及CE或FCC标志不满足NOM-004-SE要求。依据《美墨加协定》（USMCA），原产地证书可降低或免除部分进口关税，但注意：原产中国的商品通常不符合USMCA资格，须缴纳最惠国（MFN）关税税率。
summary.zht: 進口至墨西哥的無線設備須通過持有SAT（國家稅務局）RFC（聯邦納稅人登記）稅務登記的授權墨西哥法律實體清關。每批貨物須提供SAT進口申報單（pedimento）及載明進口商資訊的商業發票。產品標籤須依據NOM-004-SE（商業資訊——標籤標注）以西班牙語標注，並須顯示：IFT產品認證編號、墨西哥進口商名稱和地址、原產國、型號和序列號標識，以及適用的NOM參考標準。純中文標籤及CE或FCC標誌不滿足NOM-004-SE要求。依據《美墨加協定》（USMCA），原產地證書可降低或免除部分進口關稅，但注意：原產中國的商品通常不符合USMCA資格，須繳納最惠國（MFN）關稅稅率。

standards_or_laws: NOM-004-SE — Informacion Comercial: Etiquetado (commercial information labelling, Spanish requirement)
SAT pedimento — customs declaration requirement for import clearance
RFC (Registro Federal de Contribuyentes) — importer tax registration with SAT
Ley Aduanera — Mexican customs law governing import requirements
USMCA — US-Mexico-Canada Agreement (tariff reduction context; Chinese-origin goods generally not eligible)

summary.en: For Chinese domestic market sales, no mandatory importer-agent requirement applies. Chinese-language labelling is required domestically. For export from China, GACC (General Administration of Customs of China) export declaration is required; the Chinese exporter files the customs declaration on the China side. There is no equivalent RFC-style importer registration requirement under Chinese domestic regulations.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场销售，无强制性进口商代理人要求。国内销售须使用中文标注。从中国出口时，须由中国出口商向海关总署（GACC）提交出口申报；中方负责中国侧海关申报，无对应的RFC式进口商登记要求。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場銷售，無強制性進口商代理人要求。國內銷售須使用中文標注。從中國出口時，須由中國出口商向海關總署（GACC）提交出口申報；中方負責中國側海關申報，無對應的RFC式進口商登記要求。

standards_or_laws: GACC export declaration — China-side customs filing for goods export
GB labelling standards — Chinese-language domestic labelling
No RFC-equivalent importer registration under Chinese domestic regulations

gap.en: Hard gap — an authorized Mexican importer with RFC registration is a hard legal requirement with no workaround; Chinese exporters must engage or establish a Mexican entity. Spanish labelling per NOM-004-SE is mandatory; Chinese-language labels must be replaced or supplemented. IFT homologacion number must appear on the label. Chinese-origin goods are generally not eligible for USMCA preferential tariffs and attract MFN rates.
gap.zh: 硬性差距——具有RFC登记的授权墨西哥进口商是无法绕过的法定要求，中国出口商须委托或设立墨西哥实体。NOM-004-SE强制要求西班牙语标注，纯中文标签须更换或补充。标签须标注IFT产品认证编号。原产中国的商品通常不符合USMCA优惠关税资格，须缴纳最惠国税率。
gap.zht: 硬性差距——具有RFC登記的授權墨西哥進口商是無法繞過的法定要求，中國出口商須委託或設立墨西哥實體。NOM-004-SE強制要求西班牙語標注，純中文標籤須更換或補充。標籤須標注IFT產品認證編號。原產中國的商品通常不符合USMCA優惠關稅資格，須繳納最惠國稅率。

source.publisher: SAT — Servicio de Administracion Tributaria (Mexico Customs)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An authorized Mexican importer with RFC registration is mandatory for importing wireless devices into Mexico. Spanish labelling per NOM-004-SE including the IFT homologacion number is required. Chinese exporters must appoint or establish a Mexican legal entity. Chinese-origin goods are not USMCA-eligible and attract MFN import tariffs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 具有RFC登记的授权墨西哥进口商是向墨西哥进口无线设备的强制要求。须按NOM-004-SE要求以西班牙语标注，包括IFT产品认证编号。中国出口商须委托或设立墨西哥法律实体。原产中国的商品不符合USMCA资格，须缴纳最惠国进口关税。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 具有RFC登記的授權墨西哥進口商是向墨西哥進口無線設備的強制要求。須按NOM-004-SE要求以西班牙語標注，包括IFT產品認證編號。中國出口商須委託或設立墨西哥法律實體。原產中國的商品不符合USMCA資格，須繳納最惠國進口關稅。
